# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Automated Release Process

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  deployments: write
  workflows: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build package
        run: |
          // Add steps to build packages

      - name: Publish package
        run: |
          // Add steps to publish packages

  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Create Release
        run: |
          // Add steps to create releases

  documentation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Update Documentation
        run: |
          // Add steps to update documentation
